summary: Phase 1 admin/UI improvements (site-config + popup + WC tab + brand band + Emergent strip) — all backend endpoints pass pytest, all frontend smoke tests pass on the public preview URL.

minor.issue: test_post_site_config_non_admin_returns_403 SKIPPED — signup rate-limit (5/hr/IP) hit during previous iteration runs. The 403 path was verified manually on a fresh email.

critical_code_review_comments: ingestion.py is huge (~2200+ lines). Eventually split sport-specific upserters into adapters.* modules — not blocking, but maintainability red flag.
PopupNotice.cta() uses window.location.href for external links which forces a full nav. Acceptable for promo banners; consider rel=noopener target=_blank if SEO juice matters.

GET /api/site-config strips popup details (returns {enabled:false}) when disabled — that makes it impossible for an admin viewing the public endpoint to see the stored version. Not a bug for the user-facing contract, but the admin panel should call a separate admin GET if it wants to pre-fill the form from server state.
Header.jsx duplicates ALL_SPORTS list which also exists in backend _DEFAULT_ENABLED_SPORTS — fine for now, but if the list grows consider serving it from /api/site-config so they cannot drift.
test_credentials: admin@cloudypitch.com / CloudyAdmin2026! — signin works, role=admin enforced on POST /api/admin/site-config.
seed_data_creation: Test bumped popup version to 4 and re-disabled it; final state reset to {14 sports enabled, show_wc_tab=true, popup_notice.enabled=false} during teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints GET /api/site-config (public) and POST /api/admin/site-config (admin) are stable. Frontend Header subscribes once on boot to /site-config — requires a hard reload to pick up admin changes (no live websocket). PopupNotice stores cp_popup_dismissed_v in localStorage; clear that key to re-test the popup flow.
verified_features: GET /api/site-config returns 14 default sports when DB row missing
Subset save (football, basketball, tennis) read-back returns exactly those 3
popup_notice version increments by 1 when bump_version=true
401 returned for anonymous POST, 403 for non-admin (manually verified)
ingestion.py _enabled_sports() is called from poll_apisports_live (L866) and 5 other ingestion loops (L2167, 2172, 2177, 2219, 2256, 2263)
index.html contains no emergent.sh / emergent-main.js / posthog references; title and meta description match brief
Header sports band has forest-green gradient #0F6E56 → #064E3B with WC 2026 tab first
Disabling Tennis via admin hides sport-tab-tennis from header on reload
PopupNotice renders via portal into body, title/body/CTA visible, close + maybe dismiss buttons set localStorage cp_popup_dismissed_v
Popup does NOT re-show on subsequent reload until admin bumps version again
Admin Settings tab contains site-config-form, sport toggles, show-wc-tab, popup-* inputs, site-config-save + site-config-save-bump buttons (verified via grep on Admin.jsx)
